name: NAQEL Express
description: NAQEL Express emphasizes its commitment to becoming a leading logistics service provider in the Middle East, which includes a focus on cold chain logistics, essential for preserving perishable goods during transportation.

name: Lineage Logistics
description: Lineage Logistics is a leading provider of temperature-controlled warehousing and logistics solutions, emphasizing their expertise in cold chain logistics. They optimize the distribution of food through a global network of strategically located facilities, enhancing efficiency and sustainability in the food supply chain.

name: Cold Chain Consultants
description: Cold Chain Consultants specializes in providing operational support to the pharmaceutical and life-science industries, ensuring compliance with GDP and cold chain requirements for temperature-sensitive supply chains. Their focus on practical assistance addresses the growing regulatory emphasis on proper transportation of these products.

name: Cold Chain Technologies
description: Cold Chain Technologies (CCT) specializes in providing innovative thermal packaging and digital solutions for the shipment of temperature-sensitive materials, primarily for the life sciences industry. With over 50 years of experience, CCT focuses on addressing the unique logistical challenges faced during the cold chain journey, ensuring high-quality and regulatory-compliant distribution solutions.

name: AbleCold Logistics
description: AbleCold Logistics specializes in managing cold chain logistics, ensuring robust temperature control throughout the supply chain. Their AbleCold Operating System and smart technology optimize logistics and inventory management, helping to maintain the right conditions for products during transit and storage.

name: Frimercat S.A.
description: The company specializes in refrigerated logistics and cold chain management for the food industry, ensuring the maintenance of the cold chain through total traceability in storage and distribution. With over 20 years of experience, it collaborates closely with various stakeholders to manage a wide range of perishable products effectively.

name: Coldman Logistics Pvt Ltd
description: COLDMAN is a leading cold chain logistics company that specializes in providing customized storage and distribution solutions, particularly for pharmaceutical and nutraceutical products. They employ innovative technologies and a qualified team to ensure effective temperature integrity and traceability throughout the supply chain, exceeding customer expectations.

name: Integrated Cold Chain Logistics Sdn. Bhd.
description: The company emphasizes its commitment to integrated cold chain logistics, which is crucial for maintaining product quality and compliance with standards. Their comprehensive and customized services enhance logistic workflow management, ensuring timely deliveries and efficient handling of goods.

name: National Cold Chain Inc.
description: National Cold Chain is a specialized organization focused on temperature-controlled supply chain solutions, making it highly relevant for cold chain logistics. They offer tailored logistics and supply chain services for temperature-sensitive goods, ensuring effective handling and transportation.

name: Global Cold Chain Solutions Pte Ltd
description: Global Cold Chain Solutions specializes in temperature-controlled logistics services for the biopharmaceutical sector, ensuring reliable and compliant courier solutions for time-critical and temperature-sensitive biological samples. Their focus on quality and competitive rates makes them a key player in cold chain logistics.
